hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
dangerous = ['json.dumps', 'json.loads', 're.DOTALL', 'bundler/template']
if 'index.html' in cmd and any(p in cmd for p in dangerous):
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'WARNING: index.html 是 bundled 格式，禁止用 json.loads/json.dumps 解析再重組 template，會截斷 JSON 導致 Loading 壞掉。請改用 raw string .replace() 直接操作 file content。'}))
"
